textByHash.a76e1b607db594586a3abe2b29f0f2b1643c534a: Well you see, guv, I've got these unshakable religious convictions.
textByHash.c22e43f47ff8668170c8fc4b0a5c541cefbd69ea: Well, it's like this, see. I used to do a bit of the old priestin' on the side.
textByHash.983c2916a378df44c8d7215aa26b38f4fff05930: You know, collectin' for repairs to the church roof, passing the collection plate, jumble sales, nicking the lead off the temple roof so they needed repairing again.
textByHash.88cb1af52cc8b63e9ecac25b188c714c651c630a: Well, that's because you're not a man of the cloth are you?
textByHash.f33342b315368794a48a2afdc28daaabc431c6c1: You are, in fact, what we refer to in layman's terms as a punter.
textByHash.b2a401f3947f04c0b25c2d9d2a78b1bbeb6439c2: But anyway, all that priestin' left me with an unshakable faith in three things.
textByHash.727fa460eb92621aa24cbed6feee93710a44d328: The power of good over evil.
textByHash.46cc1867bbebec22783d266f9c58cae207812a3b: The true glory of the human spirit.
textByHash.856d1a93d8a335c39da65e6354682f5fd26e90c1: And that I ain't goin out there with those things runnin' around.
textByHash.ac9db02d8cb86f2963c2e3a3d92db13c740af1f0: I didn't nick anything, guv. I've got twenty people who'll swear blind I was...
textByHash.9c867403a364625768f78dc8a7045eb2d7dd1d69: Well, I'll bless something for you if you need it, but just don't spread it around that I'm giving out freebies.
textByHash.9dfa55b43d7f1396bcc3e97269508344800f8575: Trust me, guv, lots of people need help after coming into contact with the spirits we produce here.
textByHash.2c0433aaad23b4eeae74897d04ee979ea509deb0: Nope. You don't strike me as being... devout, you know?
textByHash.715c014e7c4b0e3012baf49d0e3834b4be0d06f9: Your holy aura, it's a little shoddy, if you catch my drift.
textByHash.bed5fb3bae7a31f17ae5e8bbf87d848bc82823ec: You need a Prayer level of 47.
textByHash.783f620c2463ed001a8acde49b6648a96c79e4f5: I might have had a bit of an overestimation problem guv. I'm sure it won't happen again.
textByHash.91e06b0dd7d25a7068d5f21d7d999a050081b80b: I might well do. Remember, only the first one's free.
textByHash.ef6ccfc6ee43a13631bdcc5cf56dd5d4be7e024f: Dominoes Ad Nauseum, Romanes Eunt Domus.
textByHash.16bda1b752cf1d13bfce88efbf712a45b3f2587f: Oh, you want the full package deal.
textByHash.f885f505baf8725d649d0176c1f87fadd2b48f55: No problem, guv. Good luck with your little problem.
textByHash.76a33c8a045b2ba42ba63c3c3c999e7856605e66: You might find that little wrench worth hanging on to after you're done with the Spirit.
textByHash.4f630ebaff9a01a3a42251129566d5b53a71f8b2: Well, it may not look much, but you'll find that you might need a few less prayer potions if you have it in your pack, if you know what I mean.
textByHash.f71eb21f55f213b2d9beea37bed6ce21cd7acf56: You mean more help? I've already blessed one wrench for you, that should be enough.
textByHash.f9382ef7927651b8c2622b4763eddc731ee16646: I'm sure it'll stay that way so long as you don't know it's missing.
textByHash.34dac5bea3ad54b432cd28faa0fb93cf65fa40e0: Nothin' guv, you just have a nice day.
textByHash.34386d7b00802b2bf41a48005905c514efaa8894: Ello again guv. I take it you're here about the wrench?
textByHash.7382589d0d0ed68e2490b588a9f3910b9b5e203c: Well guv, maybe that's what I want you to think.
textByHash.14c89e6fd236c6b032a1d4db0f7aba408106b214: As soon as you've got somewhere to put it I'll hand it over. I'll keep it nice and holy until then.
textByHash.518307c8fb962d3f8ec8780302b9f9219c638e33: There you go. I've kept it nice and holy for you.
